prompt: Identify the safety hazards, their severity, and the immediate controls required.
scenario: In a T3 work setting, the evaluated element is X-106 Housekeeping & general hazard recognition within 2.12 Safety & Rigging. The relevant subcategory is 2.10.4 Quality Inspection. The field notes describe visible cues consistent with: the visible cue-visible cue "visible cue all hazards in this jobsite photo" item - cords across walkways, missing guardrails, blocked egress/extinguishers, improvised scaffolds, unattended visible cue holes. The work is being assessed at the in-progress lifecycle state with source anchors OSHA general duty, 1926 Subpart L (scaffolds).
title: T3 X-106 Hazard spotting
